note: Phase 44B.0.1 baseline — TEMPORARY DEBT only. Lock fails on NEW files, count increases, or fingerprint changes. Legitimate server/gateway files live in SCOPE_ALLOWLIST inside ownership-lock.mjs, not here. No wildcards.

rules.description: createClient()/@supabase/supabase-js may only be used by approved gateways/server files.
Writes to public.profiles must go through the profile/identity gateway.
Writes to public.venues must go through the venue service gateway.
Billing table writes must go through the billing repository gateway.
Service-role secrets must not be READ in client bundle code (server/edge only). Name-only mentions in strings are allowed.
Analytics/reporting modules must remain read-only (no table mutations).
New string-literal error codes in the API layer must be registered in API_ERROR_CODES.

exceptions.reason: Realtime match-live sync constructs a dedicated no-persist ANON client instead of the canonical client; predates canonical realtime wiring.
